zh.lifeSummary: 當Elisabeth d'Aspremont於1218年出生在法國普洛福-阿爾培-o特 達阿爾阿爾培斯-馬利斯阿斯普雷蒙特時，她的父親Geoffroi II d'Aspremont22歲，母親Lauretta van Saarbrücken27歲。她於大約1241年與Emich IV. von Leiningen-Landeck在德國貝也普法爾茲結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1264年在德國海藍-普法爾茲海-斯盧可-可萊斯萊寧根享年46歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elisabeth d'Aspremont于1218年出生在法国普洛福-阿爾培-o特 達阿爾阿爾培斯-馬利斯阿斯普雷蒙特时，她的父亲Geoffroi II d'Aspremont22岁，母亲Lauretta van Saarbrücken27岁。她于大约1241年与Emich IV. von Leiningen-Landeck在德国貝也普法爾茲结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1264年在德国海藍-普法爾茲海-斯盧可-可萊斯萊寧根享年46岁。

nameMeanings.name: Elisabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

variants.name: Elizabeth
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Elisabeth d'Aspremont was born in 1218, in Aspremont, Alpes-Maritimes, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France, her father, Geoffroi II d'Aspremont, was 22 and her mother, Lauretta van Saarbrücken, was 27. She married Emich IV. von Leiningen-Landeck about 1241, in Palatinate, Bavaria, Germany. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. She died in 1264, in Leiningen, Rhein-Hunsrück-Kreis, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany, at the age of 46.

fr.Saarbrücken, Saarbrücken, Saarland, Germ: Saarbrücken, Kreis Saarbrücken, La Sarre, Allemagne
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elisabeth d'Aspremont est née en 1218, à Aspremont, Alpes-Maritimes, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France, son père, Geoffroi II d'Aspremont, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Lauretta van Saarbrücken, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Emich IV. von Leiningen-Landeck environ 1241, à Pfalz, Bayern, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1264, à Leiningen, Rhein-Hunsrück-Kreis, Rheinland-Pfalz, Allemagne, à l’âge de 46 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elisabeth d'Aspremont 1218 in Aspremont, Alpes-Maritimes, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Geoffroi II d'Aspremont 22 und ihre Mutter Lauretta van Saarbrücken 27. Sie hat um 1241 in Pfalz, Bayern, Deutschland Emich IV. von Leiningen-Landeck geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1264 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Leiningen, Rhein-Hunsrück-Kreis, Rheinland-Pfalz, Deutschland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elisabeth d'Aspremont è nata il nel 1218 nel Aspremont, Alpes-Maritimes, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Francia, sua padre, Geoffroi II d'Aspremont, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Lauretta van Saarbrücken, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Emich IV. von Leiningen-Landeck circa 1241, nel Pfalz, Bayern, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1264, nel Leiningen, Rhein-Hunsrück-Kreis, Rheinland-Pfalz, Germania, all'età di 46 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elisabeth d'Aspremontが1218年にフランスプローベンセ-アルペス-クoト ド'アズルアルペス-マリティメスアスプレモントで生まれた時，父Geoffroi II d'Aspremontは22歳，母Lauretta van Saarbrückenは27歳であった。約1241年にドイツバイエルンプファルズでEmich IV. von Leiningen-Landeckと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1264年にドイツルヘインランド-プファルズルヘイン-ハンスルuク-クレイスレイニンジェンで46歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elisabeth d'Aspremont(이)가 1218년 프랑스 프로븐스-알페스-co트 드'아저 알페스-마이팀스 아스프렘트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Geoffroi II d'Aspremont(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lauretta van Saarbrücken(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 대략 1241년 독일 베이른 p팔즈에서 Emich IV. von Leiningen-Landeck(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1264년 독일 리인랜드-p팔즈 리이-헌스uck-크레이스 레이닝에서 46세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elisabeth d'Aspremont nasceu em 1218, em Aspremont, Alpes-Maritimes, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, França, seu pai, Geoffroi II d'Aspremont, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Lauretta van Saarbrücken, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Emich IV. von Leiningen-Landeck aproximadamente 1241, em Pfalz, Bayern, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1264, em Leiningen, Rhein-Hunsrück-Kreis, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemanha, com 46 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elisabeth d'Aspremont родилась в 1218 г. в местности аспремонт, алпес-маритимесь, провенсе-алпес-кoт д'азур, Франция, её отцу по имени Geoffroi II d'Aspremont было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Lauretta van Saarbrücken, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Emich IV. von Leiningen-Landeck около 1241 г. в местности пфалз, беиирн, Германия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1264 г. в местности лининген, раин-хунсрuкк-крис, раинланд-пфалз, Германия в возрасте 46 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elisabeth d'Aspremont nació en 1218, en Aspremont, Alpes-Maritimes, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Francia, su papá, Geoffroi II d'Aspremont, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Lauretta van Saarbrücken, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Emich IV. von Leiningen-Landeck aproximadamente 1241, en Pfalz, Bayern, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas. Murió en 1264, en Leiningen, Rhein-Hunsrück-Kreis, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemania, a la edad de 46 años.
